title: Stop Fing Raining
description: It stops it from raining all the time.
body:
# STOP FING RAINING!!!!!

Are you tired of it raining all the time? Just non stop raining over and over and over? 

**LOOK NO FURTHER!!!!!**

This mod clears the weather if it's been raining non-stop for the last three days.

Created out of frustration by two people who didn't want it to rain all the time.
